conversation.content:

COLUMNS:

---

  A: value="Not reported" | page=None | modality=text | reasoning="The document mentions 'eligible patients had metastatic prostate cancer that was newly-diagnosed or relapsing after previous local therapy', but does not specify the type of previous local therapy (e.g., prostatectomy) or provide counts/percentages for the treatment arm."
